title.ko: 하물이송에 적합한 차량 또는 특수하물 또는 특수목적물을 이송, 운반 또는 반입하는 데 적합한 차량(환자 또는 신체장애자를 위한 특별한 설비를 가진 차량 A61G 3/00)
title.en: VEHICLES ADAPTED FOR LOAD TRANSPORTATION OR TO TRANSPORT, TO CARRY, OR TO COMPRISE SPECIAL LOADS OR OBJECTS (vehicles with special provisions for transporting patients or disabled persons, or their personal conveyances A61G0003000000)

definition.ko: 클래스 B60의 타이틀에 계속되는 주에 주의할 것

title.ko: 주로 하물운반용으로서 짐 싣기, 하물의 고정 또는 짐 내리기를 쉽게 한 차량(자동짐싣기 또는 자동짐 내리기용의 수단을 가진 수확작물운반차량 A01D 90/00; 쓰레기수집차 B65F; 차량중에 편입되어 있지 않은 장치에 의한 차량에의 짐 싣기, 차량으로부터의 짐 내리기 B65G)
title.en: Vehicles predominantly for transporting loads and modified to facilitate loading, consolidating the load, or unloading (vehicles for carrying harvested crops with means for self-loading or self-unloading A01D0090000000;peculiar to refuse-collecting-vehicles B65F;loading or unloading vehicles by means not incorporated therein B65G)

title.ko: 하물지지부재 또는 하물용기(적재함)의 평행상하이동을 갖는 것(경사하는 것과 결합하는 것 1/34; 차륜 또는 그와 유사한 것에 의하여 이동가능한 것으로 짐 싣기나 짐 내리기에 사용되는 부피가 크고 무거운 물건을 승하강시키는 장치. 예. 포오크 리프트 트럭, B66F 9/06)
title.en: with parallel up-and-down movement of load supporting or containing element (in combination with tipping B60P0001340000;devices for lifting or lowering bulky or heavy goods for loading or unloading purposes, movable on wheels or the like, e.g. fork-lift trucks, B66F0009060000)

title.ko: 하물지지부재 또는 하물용기(적재함)의 경사운반을 수반하는 것(굴삭 또는 토사이송 기계 E02F 3/00)
title.en: with a tipping movement of load supporting or containing element (dredges or soil-shifting machines E02F0003000000)
actuated by mechanical gearing only
with relative displacement of the wheel axles
with screw and nut
with toothed gears, wheels, or sectors; with links, cams and rollers, or the like
with cables, chains, or the like
actuated by fluid-operated mechanisms
with relative displacement of the wheel axles
with toothed gears, wheels, or sectors; with links, cams and rollers, or the like
with cables, chains, or the like
using the weight of the load
Means for controlling movement of tailboards or sideboards
Controlling degree of tailboard or sideboard movement in dependence upon degree of tipping movement, e.g. by linkage or cam
Providing interdependence between tipping movement and the latching or unlatching of a freely-swingable tailboard or sideboard
Tipping-body constructions
in combination with another movement of the element
the other movement being lateral displacement
the other movement being raising or lowering
using endless chains or belts thereon
forming the main load supporting or containing element or part thereof
using screw conveyors thereon
mounted on the load supporting or containing element

title.ko: 차량에 부착되는 하물경사로(로딩램프)를 사용하는 것(하물경사로 그 자체 B65G 69/28)
title.en: using a loading ramp mounted on the vehicle (loading ramps per seB65G0069280000)
having a loading platform thereon raising the load to the level of the load supporting or containing element
carried in vertical guides

title.ko: 하물지지부재 또는 하물용기(적재함)상으로 들어 올릴 수가 있는 추동완을 사용하는 것(하물계합부재 B66)
title.en: using pivoted arms raisable above the load supporting or containing element (load-engaging elements B66)
loading from in front of the vehicle
using rollers in the load supporting or containing element

title.ko: 자동짐싣기 또는 자동짐 내리기를 위해서 크레인을 사용하는 것(크레인 운반용 차량 3/28, 이동 크레인 B66C)
title.en: using cranes for self-loading or self-unloading (vehicles for transporting cranes B60P0003280000;mobile or travelling cranes B66C)
the load supporting or containing element having bottom discharging openings
using vibratory effect
using fluids, e.g. having direct contact between fluid and load
with porous walls

title.ko: 용이하게 떼어낼 수가 있는 하물지지부재 또는 하물용기(적재함) (차량설비에 의해서 지지되는 떼어낼 수 있는 형태의 주거설비에 의해서 특징 지워지는 케라반, 캠핑 또는 그와 유사한 차량 3/33, 3/345)
title.en: the load supporting or containing element being readily removable (caravans, camping, or the like vehicles characterised by living accommodation in the form of a removable body supported by the vehicle unit B60P0003330000, B60P0003345000)

title.ko: 특수하물을 수송, 운반, 수용하는 차량(환자 또는 신체장애자를 위한 특수설비를 갖춘차 A61G 3/00; 영구차 A61G 21/00; 소방차 A62C 27/00; 쓰레기 수집차 B65F 3/00, 7/00; 제설차 E01H; 장갑 또는 병장차량 F41H 7/00; 자주지뢰제거차 F41H 11/16)
title.en: Vehicles adapted to transport, to carry or to comprise special loads or objects (ambulances or other vehicles with special provisions for transporting patients or disabled persons, or their personal conveyances A61G0003000000;hearses A61G0021000000;fire-fighting land vehicles A62C0027000000;refuse-collecting vehicles B65F0003000000, B65F0007000000;snow-removing vehicles E01H;armoured or armed vehicles F41H0007000000;self-propelled mine-clearing vehicles F41H0011160000)

title.ko: 조립식 건물 또는 그 일부를 수송하기 위한 것, 예. 조립식 차고 또는 그와 유사한 것(건물부재를 운반하거나 조립하는 것 E04G 21/14)
title.en: for transporting prefabricated buildings or modules thereof, e.g. prefabricated garages or the like (conveying or assembling building elements E04G0021140000)

title.ko: 운반목적물이 상점, 카페테리아 또는 진열대인 것(운반목적물이 작업장인 것 3/14)
title.en: the object being a shop, cafeteria or display (the object being a workshop B60P0003140000)
for transporting money or other valuables
for transporting reel units
for transporting animals

title.ko: 식육 수송용(냉장, 냉동품 수송용 3/20)
title.en: for transporting meat (for transporting refrigerated goods B60P0003200000)
for transporting bottles

title.ko: 승용물 운반용(3/12가 우선, 케라반, 캠핑 또는 차량 운반수단을 가진 차량 3/363)
title.en: for carrying vehicles (B60P0003120000 takes precedence;caravans, camping, or like vehicles with vehicle-carrying means B60P0003363000)

title.ko: 노면차량 운반용
title.en: for carrying road vehicles
Arrangement of overturned or on-edge vehicles

title.ko: 차량 리테이너(retainer)
title.en: Vehicle retainers
for wheels, hubs, or axle shafts
Wheel cradles, chocks, or wells

title.ko: 묶음고정장치(3/075가 우선)
title.en: Tie-downs (B60P0003075000 takes precedence)
Multilevel-deck construction carrying vehicles
for carrying boats
for carrying aircraft
for salvaging damaged vehicles

title.ko: 운반목적물이 정비, 보수용 또는 작업중인 작업원을 운반하기 위한 작업장인 것(작업원용의 가동플랫폼 또는 캐빈(cabin)을 위한 승강장치)
title.en: the object being a workshop for servicing, for maintenance, or for carrying workmen during work (lifting devices for movable platforms or cabins for workmen B66F0011040000)
for carrying mixed concrete, e.g. having rotatable drums
the object being a searchlight

title.ko: 냉장, 냉동품 수송용(화물실의 공기처리 B60H)
title.en: for transporting refrigerated goods (air treatment of goods space B60H)
Tank vehicles (tank aspects B65D0088000000, B65D0090000000, F17C)
compartmented

title.ko: 기중기(crane)운반차(기중기를 갖는 자기 적하기 1/54, 이동 또는 주행기중기 B66C)
title.en: for transporting cranes (vehicles using cranes for self-loading or self-unloading B60P0001540000;mobile or travelling cranes B66C)

title.ko: 분무차(액체비료용의 산포차 A01C 23/00; 유해한 동물, 해충, 불요한 식물의 절멸용 A01M; 아스팔트 역청 타르 또는 같은 종류의 것의 살포용 E01C; 도로청소용 E01H)
title.en: Spraying-vehicles (sprinkling-wagons for fertilising liquid A01C0023000000;for destruction of noxious animals, vermin, or unwanted vegetation A01M;for spraying asphalt, bitumen, tar, or the like E01C;for cleaning streets E01H)

title.ko: 주거설비를 수용하는 것, 예. 케라반, 캠핑 또는 이와 유사한 차량(텐트 또는 천개(canopies)
title.en: comprising living accommodation for people, e.g. caravans, camping, or like vehicles (tents or canopies, in general E04H0015000000)

title.ko: 전개하거나 접거나 재배열할 수 없는 주거설비
title.en: the living accommodation being neither expansible nor collapsible nor capable of rearrangement
characterised by living accommodation in the form of a removable body supported by the vehicle unit

title.ko: 트레일러 타입의 차량에 의해서 지지되거나 또는 트레일러 타입 자체인 것(3/33이 우선)
title.en: supported by a trailer-type vehicle or being itself of the trailer-type (B60P0003330000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 전개하거나 접어 겹칠 수 있거나 재배열이 가능한 주거설비(3/39가 우선, 차량에 의해서 부분적으로 지지되는 텐트 E04H 15/06)
title.en: the living accommodation being expansible, collapsible or capable of rearrangement (B60P0003390000 takes precedence;tents supported at least partially by vehicles E04H0015060000)
characterised by living accommodation in the form of a removable body supported by the vehicle unit

title.ko: 트레일러 타입의 차량에 의해서 지지되거나 트레일러 타입 그 자체인 것(3/345가 우선)
title.en: supported by a trailer-type vehicle or being itself of the trailer-type (B60P0003345000 takes precedence)
collapsible to a condition not usable as living accommodation, e.g. to a trailer of compact design

title.ko: 보조장치, 주거설비의 장치(화장실 또는 세면설비 B60R 15/00) 세부
title.en: Auxiliary arrangements; Arrangements of living accommodation (toilet or washing arrangements B60R0015000000); Details
with vehicle-carrying means
with boat-carrying means

title.ko: 외부 플랫폼, 예 포오치(건물용 차양 E04F 10/00 트레일러 차양 E04H 15/08 텐트용 차양 E04H 15/58)
title.en: Exterior platforms, e.g. porch (awnings for buildings E04F0010000000;trailer awnings E04H0015080000;awnings for tents E04H0015580000)
Passageways between living accommodation and vehicle operating compartment
Means for securing living accommodation to vehicle unit
Sleeping arrangements
expansible, collapsible or repositionable elements adapted to support a bed, e.g. wall portions

title.ko: 긴 하물의 운반용, 예 분리된 바퀴 달린 하물지지부재를 갖는 것(3/022 우선, 돌출 적재된 하물의 신호장치(B60Q 7/02)
title.en: for carrying long loads, e.g. with separate wheeled load-supporting elements (B60P0003022000 takes precedence;signal devices to be attached to overhanging load B60Q0007020000)
for log transport

title.ko: 하나의 용도로부터 다른 용도로 변경할 수 있는 것(다른 매체 속 또는 매체 위를 달릴 수 있는 차량, 레일과 도로겸용 차량 B60F)
title.en: convertible from one use to a different one (vehicles capable of travelling in or on different media, rail-and-road vehicles B60F)

title.ko: 차량 위의 계량기 장치(운반차량 위에서 사용하는 계량기 G01G 19/08)
title.en: Arrangements of weighing machines on vehicles (adapting weighing machines to use on transport vehicles G01G0019080000)

title.en: Securing or covering of load on vehicles
Covering of load
by tarpaulins or like flexible members

title.ko: 하물의 고정(차량 리테이너 3/073)
title.en: Securing of load (vehicle retainers B60P0003073000)

title.ko: 차량의 바닥 또는 양측벽에 고정하는 것(7/13, 7/135가 우선)

the load being tree-trunks, beams, drums, tubes, or the like

the load bracing means comprising a movable bar
